codeReview.summary: Implementation of `werk init` command is complete and correct. The code follows all conventions from AGENTS.md, properly implements idempotent workspace creation with local and global support, handles JSON output, and includes comprehensive integration tests. The worker followed the rust-cli-worker skill procedure with TDD (write tests first, then implement).

summary: foundation-init passes scrutiny. The implementation correctly creates .werk/sd.db with proper schema, supports --global flag for ~/.werk/ initialization, is idempotent (preserves data on re-init), produces both human-readable and JSON output, handles permission errors gracefully with descriptive messages, and includes 13 integration tests covering all expected behaviors. All tests pass (45 total for werk), clippy clean, no sd-core regressions.
